name: Espresso
description: A bold and concentrated shot of premium coffee with a rich aroma and smooth crema.

name: Americano
description: Espresso diluted with hot water for a smooth, balanced taste.

name: Cappuccino
description: Espresso with steamed milk and thick milk foam.

name: Flat White
description: Rich espresso with silky steamed milk and light microfoam.

name: Caramel Latte
description: Smooth espresso blended with steamed milk and rich caramel syrup.

name: Mocha
description: Espresso mixed with chocolate and steamed milk.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Refreshing chilled coffee blended with milk and ice.

name: Iced Latte
description: Espresso served over ice with chilled milk.

name: Iced Mocha
description: Chocolate espresso served cold over ice.

name: Cheesecake
description: Creamy baked cheesecake with a buttery biscuit base.

name: Chocolate Brownie
description: Rich, fudgy chocolate brownie served fresh.

name: Butter Croissant
description: Freshly baked buttery croissant with flaky layers.

name: Chocolate Cookie
description: Crunchy outside with a soft chocolate-filled center.

name: Fresh Muffin
description: Soft freshly baked muffin available in seasonal flavors.
